page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genome Aggregation Database (gnomAD) - browser that aggregates exome and whole-genome sequencing data from a wide variety of large-scale sequencing projects. It enables search of genetic variation information by gene, variant or region.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Genome Aggregation Database (gnomAD) - browser that aggregates exome and whole-genome sequencing data from a wide variety of large-scale sequencing projects. It enables search of genetic variation information by gene, variant or region.
